ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s on-chain capital flows and the sustainability of its DApp ecosystem, as revenue hits an 18-month low. Ongoing discussions highlight both weakened activity and deepening liquidity.
ctxTalking:
• Solana Foundation’s president declared crypto gaming “dead,” though some brands remain active in the space
• Capital is repositioning on Solana, with speculation about a new cycle forming
• Solana DApps revenue has dropped sharply, raising concerns about ecosystem health
ctxMatters: Lower DApp revenue and bearish derivatives data could impact developer and user engagement. Liquidity improvements and capital shifts may signal changing priorities or strategies for builders and treasuries. Statements from Solana leadership about gaming may influence project focus and investment.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Revenue and activity declines on Solana DApps, and notable capital repositioning on-chain.
Noise: Broad declarations about the end of crypto gaming, as some brands continue to build.
ctxGlossary:
DApp — Decentralized application built on a blockchain
On-chain — Activity or transactions recorded directly on the blockchain

readMore.title: Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
Solana sees capital repositioning on-chain – Is a new cycle forming?
Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
